chapters.title: Welcome to React Native
chapters.description: Dive into the world of mobile development with React Native – build your first app today!

chapters.title: JSX and Core Components
chapters.description: Learn the building blocks of any React Native screen: JSX, Views, Text, and more.

chapters.title: Props and State
chapters.description: Make your apps interactive with props and the powerful useState hook.

chapters.title: Lists and ScrollView
chapters.description: Display dynamic data efficiently using FlatList, SectionList, and ScrollView.

chapters.title: Navigation
chapters.description: Move between screens seamlessly with React Navigation – stack, tabs, and drawers.

chapters.title: Styling Deep Dive
chapters.description: Master Flexbox, platform‑specific styling, and responsive layouts.

chapters.title: User Input and Forms
chapters.description: Handle text input, forms, validation, and the on‑screen keyboard like a pro.

chapters.title: Networking and Data
chapters.description: Fetch data from APIs, manage loading states, and handle errors gracefully.

chapters.title: State Management with Context
chapters.description: Tame prop drilling with the Context API and the useContext hook.

chapters.title: Device Features
chapters.description: Access the camera, location, and local storage using AsyncStorage.

chapters.title: Performance and Debugging
chapters.description: Identify bottlenecks, use debugging tools, and optimise your app.

chapters.title: Publishing
chapters.description: Prepare your app for the stores – build, sign, and submit to iOS and Android.
